Apple___Apple_scab: 🍎 Remove infected leaves, apply fungicide, and ensure proper spacing for airflow.
Apple___Black_rot: 🍎 Prune affected branches and use protective sprays.
Apple___Cedar_apple_rust: 🍎 Use resistant varieties and apply fungicide during early growth.
Apple___healthy: 🍎 Healthy! Maintain soil nutrients and monitor weekly.
Corn_(maize)___Common_rust_: 🌽 Rotate crops, use resistant hybrids, and apply fungicide if severe.
Corn_(maize)___Northern_Leaf_Blight: 🌽 Plant resistant varieties and avoid overhead irrigation.
Corn_(maize)___healthy: 🌽 Healthy! Ensure balanced fertilization and proper spacing.
Tomato___Early_blight: 🍅 Use resistant varieties, apply fungicide, and rotate crops.
Tomato___Late_blight: 🍅 Avoid overhead watering, use resistant seeds, and apply fungicide.
Tomato___Leaf_Mold: 🍅 Improve ventilation, reduce humidity, and remove infected leaves.
Tomato___healthy: 🍅 Healthy! Maintain irrigation schedule and monitor for pests.
Potato___Early_blight: 🥔 Remove infected leaves, rotate crops, and apply fungicide.
Potato___Late_blight: 🥔 Avoid wet foliage, use resistant varieties, and apply fungicide.
Potato___healthy: 🥔 Healthy! Maintain soil drainage and regular monitoring.
Grape___Black_rot: 🍇 Remove mummified berries, prune infected vines, and apply fungicide.
Grape___healthy: 🍇 Healthy! Maintain canopy airflow and balanced fertilization.
Peach___Bacterial_spot: 🍑 Use resistant varieties and copper sprays.
Peach___healthy: 🍑 Healthy! Monitor for leaf spots and maintain orchard hygiene.
Pepper,_bell___Bacterial_spot: 🌶️ Use disease-free seeds and apply copper-based sprays.
Pepper,_bell___healthy: 🌶️ Healthy! Maintain soil moisture and monitor for pests.
Healthy: 🌱 Plant looks healthy! Maintain soil health, proper irrigation, and regular monitoring.
